item.title: CoolReader 3 [Ebook Software]
item.itunes:title: CoolReader 3 [Ebook Software]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
CoolReader 3
(Ebook Software)
CoolReader is fast and small cross-platform XML/CSS based eBook reader for desktops and handheld devices. Supported formats: FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI. Platforms: Win32, Linux, Android. Ported on some eInk based devices.
Features

Read electronic books in FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI formats
Stylesheet support
A lot of customizations for better reading performance


[read more]
item.description:
CoolReader 3
(Ebook Software)
CoolReader is fast and small cross-platform XML/CSS based eBook reader for desktops and handheld devices. Supported formats: FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI. Platforms: Win32, Linux, Android. Ported on some eInk based devices.
Features

Read electronic books in FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI formats
Stylesheet support
A lot of customizations for better reading performance


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
CoolReader 3
(Ebook Software)
CoolReader is fast and small cross-platform XML/CSS based eBook reader for desktops and handheld devices. Supported formats: FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI. Platforms: Win32, Linux, Android. Ported on some eInk based devices.
Features

Read electronic books in FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI formats
Stylesheet support
A lot of customizations for better reading performance


[read more]

item.title: p7zip-gui [File Management]
item.itunes:title: p7zip-gui [File Management]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
p7zip-gui
(File Management)
p7zip is a linux port of the Windows programs 7z.exe and 7za.exe provided by 7-zip.
7-zip is a file archiver with the highest compression ratio. Homepage : www.7-zip.org

7z uses plugins (7z.so and Codecs/Rar29.so) to handle archives. 7za is a stand-alone executable. 7za handles less archive formats than 7z.exe. 7zr is a light stand-alone executable that supports only 7z/LZMA/BCJ/BCJ2.

Some GUI : 7zG : alpha stage 7zFM : alpha stage

Also add some context menus for KDE4, KDE5 and KDE6 (deb package only).

[read more]
item.description:
p7zip-gui
(File Management)
p7zip is a linux port of the Windows programs 7z.exe and 7za.exe provided by 7-zip.
7-zip is a file archiver with the highest compression ratio. Homepage : www.7-zip.org

7z uses plugins (7z.so and Codecs/Rar29.so) to handle archives. 7za is a stand-alone executable. 7za handles less archive formats than 7z.exe. 7zr is a light stand-alone executable that supports only 7z/LZMA/BCJ/BCJ2.

Some GUI : 7zG : alpha stage 7zFM : alpha stage

Also add some context menus for KDE4, KDE5 and KDE6 (deb package only).

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
p7zip-gui
(File Management)
p7zip is a linux port of the Windows programs 7z.exe and 7za.exe provided by 7-zip.
7-zip is a file archiver with the highest compression ratio. Homepage : www.7-zip.org

7z uses plugins (7z.so and Codecs/Rar29.so) to handle archives. 7za is a stand-alone executable. 7za handles less archive formats than 7z.exe. 7zr is a light stand-alone executable that supports only 7z/LZMA/BCJ/BCJ2.

Some GUI : 7zG : alpha stage 7zFM : alpha stage

Also add some context menus for KDE4, KDE5 and KDE6 (deb package only).

[read more]

item.title: Ai Gate [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Ai Gate [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: inulute
item.itunes:summary:
Ai Gate
(Utilities)
Ai-Gate brings ChatGPT, Google Bard, Perplexity AI and Anthropic Claude together as collection for your convenience. NO API key needed.

[read more]
item.description:
Ai Gate
(Utilities)
Ai-Gate brings ChatGPT, Google Bard, Perplexity AI and Anthropic Claude together as collection for your convenience. NO API key needed.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Ai Gate
(Utilities)
Ai-Gate brings ChatGPT, Google Bard, Perplexity AI and Anthropic Claude together as collection for your convenience. NO API key needed.

[read more]

item.title: QTrans [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: QTrans [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: tkbj
item.itunes:summary:
QTrans
(Utilities)
QTrans is a word translator (offline dictionary frontend for Babylon, StarDict and Dictd dictionaries) written in Qt5/KF5 or Qt5.
It uses following dictionaries:
- Babylon (*.dic, *.bgl),
- StarDict (*.dict, *.dict.dz: *.ifo),
- Dictd and FreeDict (*.dict, *.dict.dz: *.index) as well as plain text (*.dic.txt).

Plain text dictionaries should have the format: "expression [Tab] definition".

https://sourceforge.net/projects/qtrans0/
https://software.opensuse.org/package/qtrans
[read more]
item.description:
QTrans
(Utilities)
QTrans is a word translator (offline dictionary frontend for Babylon, StarDict and Dictd dictionaries) written in Qt5/KF5 or Qt5.
It uses following dictionaries:
- Babylon (*.dic, *.bgl),
- StarDict (*.dict, *.dict.dz: *.ifo),
- Dictd and FreeDict (*.dict, *.dict.dz: *.index) as well as plain text (*.dic.txt).

Plain text dictionaries should have the format: "expression [Tab] definition".

https://sourceforge.net/projects/qtrans0/
https://software.opensuse.org/package/qtrans
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QTrans
(Utilities)
QTrans is a word translator (offline dictionary frontend for Babylon, StarDict and Dictd dictionaries) written in Qt5/KF5 or Qt5.
It uses following dictionaries:
- Babylon (*.dic, *.bgl),
- StarDict (*.dict, *.dict.dz: *.ifo),
- Dictd and FreeDict (*.dict, *.dict.dz: *.index) as well as plain text (*.dic.txt).

Plain text dictionaries should have the format: "expression [Tab] definition".

https://sourceforge.net/projects/qtrans0/
https://software.opensuse.org/package/qtrans
[read more]

item.title: Mac Picture Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Picture Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Picture Restore
(Utilities)
Hey! Now Mac Picture Restore software recovers corrupted images, pictures, pics and snaps from apple based devices without any prior technical assistance. www.memorycardrestore.com represents restoration application that helps you in regaining and restoring deleted data files and folders at their specified location within few clicks of mouse.

[read more]
item.description:

(Utilities)
Hey! Now Mac Picture Restore software recovers corrupted images, pictures, pics and snaps from apple based devices without any prior technical assistance. www.memorycardrestore.com represents restoration application that helps you in regaining and restoring deleted data files and folders at their specified location within few clicks of mouse.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Mac Picture Restore
(Utilities)
Hey! Now Mac Picture Restore software recovers corrupted images, pictures, pics and snaps from apple based devices without any prior technical assistance. www.memorycardrestore.com represents restoration application that helps you in regaining and restoring deleted data files and folders at their specified location within few clicks of mouse.

[read more]

item.title: GS DNS INJECTOR [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]

item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS DNS INJECTOR
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h2][color=#FF0000] GS DNS [/color][color=#008000] INJECTOR [/color][/h2]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b] COMBO [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1596767/]1.Game Graphic Unlicker [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1664811/]2.GSM ZRAM [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1596710/]3.GODSPEED MODE [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]

[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]

GS DNS Injector, developed by @revWhiteShadow, is a versatile and powerful module designed to enhance your DNS (Domain Name System) configuration. By utilizing this tool, you can effortlessly switch between various DNS servers such as OpenDNS, Google DNS, Norton DNS, Ads Blocker DNS, and Cloudflare DNS.

The GS DNS Injector empowers users to modify their DNS settings easily, providing an efficient means to enhance their internet browsing experience. By choosing different DNS servers, users can potentially optimize their network performance, improve security, and gain access to advanced features provided by these DNS providers.

This module also includes an ads blocker DNS feature, which can help reduce unwanted advertisements during web browsing sessions, enhancing overall user experience. By leveraging this functionality, users can enjoy a cleaner and more streamlined browsing environment.

Whether you seek improved speed, enhanced security, or targeted ad blocking capabilities, the GS DNS Injector developed by @revWhiteShadow is a valuable tool for DNS management, allowing you to effortlessly switch between popular DNS servers and customize your internet experience.

Title: Elevate Your Internet Experience with GS DNS Injector: The Ultimate DNS Configuration Tool

Introducing GS DNS Injector, a groundbreaking Magisk module developed by @revWhiteShadow, engineered to revolutionize your DNS (Domain Name System) settings. With this versatile tool at your disposal, you gain the power to seamlessly switch between top-tier DNS servers such as OpenDNS, Google DNS, Norton DNS, Ads Blocker DNS, and Cloudflare DNS, unleashing a new realm of possibilities for optimizing your internet connectivity.

### Effortless DNS Configuration
With GS DNS Injector, modifying your DNS settings has never been easier. Say goodbye to the hassle of manual configuration and hello to a user-friendly interface that empowers you to customize your DNS preferences with just a few taps. Whether you're seeking enhanced speed, improved security, or targeted ad blocking capabilities, GS DNS Injector puts the power in your hands.

### Optimize Your Browsing Experience
By leveraging the capabilities of GS DNS Injector, you can supercharge your internet browsing experience in ways you never thought possible. Choose from a range of DNS servers tailored to your specific needs, whether it's boosting speed, fortifying security, or eliminating pesky advertisements that clutter your screen. With GS DNS Injector, the choice is yours.

### Advanced Ads Blocking
Tired of being bombarded with intrusive ads while surfing the web? GS DNS Injector has you covered. With its built-in ads blocker DNS feature, you can bid farewell to unwanted advertisements that disrupt your browsing sessions. Enjoy a cleaner, more streamlined online experience as you navigate the web with ease.

### Seamless Integration
GS DNS Injector seamlessly integrates with the Magisk framework, ensuring a smooth installation process and compatibility with a wide range of Android devices. Simply download the module, install it using Magisk Manager, and unlock a world of possibilities for enhancing your DNS configuration.

### Elevate Your Connectivity with GS DNS Injector
Whether you're a casual user looking to optimize your browsing experience or a tech enthusiast seeking advanced DNS management capabilities, GS DNS Injector is the ultimate solution. Join the ranks of satisfied users who have transformed their internet connectivity with this powerful Magisk module. Experience the difference today and take control of your DNS configuration like never before.
[read more]

This module also includes an ads blocker DNS feature, which can help reduce unwanted advertisements during web browsing sessions, enhancing overall user experience. By leveraging this functionality, users can enjoy a cleaner and more streamlined browsing environment.

Whether you seek improved speed, enhanced security, or targeted ad blocking capabilities, the GS DNS Injector developed by @revWhiteShadow is a valuable tool for DNS management, allowing you to effortlessly switch between popular DNS servers and customize your internet experience.

Whether you're seeking enhanced speed, improved security, or targeted ad blocking capabilities, GS DNS Injector puts the power in your hands.

item.title: Recover Deleted Sim [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover Deleted Sim [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdeletedfiles
item.itunes:summary:
Recover Deleted Sim
(Utilities)
Recover Deleted Sim software is easily available on website www.pdd.co.in which enables to salvage lost information from damaged and corrupted GSM supportable SIM card memory storage device in just fraction of seconds without any need of applying technical training. SIM recovery utility regain contact numbers, text messages and other details like IMEI number, network location etc in simplest way.

[read more]
item.description:
Recover Deleted Sim
(Utilities)
Recover Deleted Sim software is easily available on website www.pdd.co.in which enables to salvage lost information from damaged and corrupted GSM supportable SIM card memory storage device in just fraction of seconds without any need of applying technical training. SIM recovery utility regain contact numbers, text messages and other details like IMEI number, network location etc in simplest way.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Recover Deleted Sim
(Utilities)
Recover Deleted Sim software is easily available on website www.pdd.co.in which enables to salvage lost information from damaged and corrupted GSM supportable SIM card memory storage device in just fraction of seconds without any need of applying technical training. SIM recovery utility regain contact numbers, text messages and other details like IMEI number, network location etc in simplest way.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Picture Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Picture Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Picture Restore
(Utilities)
www.memorycardrestore.com provides Digital Picture Restore application can recover damaged or deleted party images, snapshots, photos albums from commonly used disk storage volume in less processing time. Professionally Picture salvage utility has been able to recover formatted or damaged multimedia images, anniversary photos albums, still photographs from corrupted camera storage device. Fully programmed Digital Picture Restore program has featured with best graphical user interface lets allows user to rescue and repair precious images, captured party pictures from all kind of memory card storage formats includes XD, SD, MMC, SD, Micro SD, Mini SD, flash, picture cards. Download technically advanced Digital Picture Restore program from www.memorycardrestore.com for understanding features and functionalities about the working of software before actual used. Picture recovery tool is simple yet powerful utility to salvage lost or damaged crucial baby picture, party snaps, and snapshots from USB storage in most comprehensive way. Best quality Digital Picture Restore tool is able to retrieve accidentally lost or deleted flash images, animated pictures from inaccessible USB storage media. Award winning Digital Picture Restore software supports working with all standards memory card manufacture like Western digital, Canon, Hitachi, Digital Dream, Yakumo, Yashika, Olympus, Kodak, HP, IBM, HCL, Sony, Philips, Seagate, Toshiba, Acerany many more.Features:* Digital Picture Restore software restores lost or damaged images with supporting Windows 11,10,7,Vista OS.*Facilitates quick recovery of images, snapshots, and photos albums from virus infected memory card or inaccessible HDD.* Supports recovery of damaged images from all storage formats includes BMP, TIFF, PNG, PSD, JPEG, JPG and GIF.

[read more]
